description.summary: Publish the TC skill as an npm package so users can install with npx tc-skill init instead of cloning the repo
description.motivation: Lowering the adoption barrier is critical for gaining traction. npm install is the standard onboarding path for the major skill registries (antigravity uses npx, superpowers uses plugin install). A CLI entry point makes the skill accessible to users who don't want to manually clone and wire up files.
description.detailed_design: Create package.json with bin entry, CLI script that copies skill files into the target project, support --claude/--cursor/--codex/--gemini flags for agent-specific paths. Keep it simple — the CLI copies files and runs tc init.

files_affected.description: npm package manifest with bin entry, keywords, and file list
CLI entry point with init and install commands, cross-platform support
Excludes docs/TC/records, evidence, .git, examples from npm package

revision_history.author: ai:claude-opus-4-6
